title: claude-workflow
description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration plugin for Claude Code. Branch-per-task development with specialist agents, automated QA cycles, and crash-safe JSONL progress tracking. 14 slash commands for structured feature development.

title: Agentic Desktop Command
description: Full-stack multi-device workspace and project management platform. Electron 39 + React 19 with mobile, Mac, and Windows support. Uses Claude Agent Teams to automate tasks from bullet-point tickets to merged PRs.

title: Syrnia Tracker
description: Chrome extension for storing, formatting, analyzing, and exporting gameplay data. Fully local in-browser processing with dashboards, historical tracking, and zero external dependencies.

title: PR Review Toolkit
description: Claude Code CLI plugin for GitHub PR listing, filtering, and multi-agent parallel review with claude-workflow integration.

title: Agentic Terminal Wrapper
description: Electron wrapper for Claude Code CLI with a full GUI — file explorer, split panes, project tabs, and image paste support.

title: claude-workflow Marketplace
description: Plugin marketplace for claude-workflow — distribution and discovery hub for multi-agent workflow orchestration plugins for Claude Code.

title: GameDar
description: Game discovery and radar app for finding new games across platforms. Live at gamedar.netlify.app.

title: Manning Signs Inc.
description: Business website built for Manning Signs Inc. Full production site at manningsigns.org.

title: Personal Portfolio
description: This site — built with React 19, TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS 4, and Vite. Dark bento-grid design with responsive layouts.
